steps.name: contract-and-validator
steps.summary: Add the Grade 2 mission contract, 12-unit Alpha distribution, curriculum metadata, safe fallback, and mission bank validator.

steps.name: answer-normalizers
steps.summary: Add integer, length, time-of-day, duration, and label normalization with structured input error handling.

steps.name: alpha-mission-bank
steps.summary: Add 36 Alpha missions across 12 Grade 2 units, three missions per unit in easy, medium, and applied order.

steps.name: unit-flow-and-visuals
steps.summary: Add /grade/2 with unit selection, three-mission unit focus, structured inputs, hints, rewards, and Grade 2 visual models.

steps.name: quality-gates
steps.summary: Add focused unit/component tests, grade2 validation, and E2E coverage for the Grade 2 route and core learner flows.
